prompt_task: Run the DNA language model here: https://huggingface.co/kuleshov-group/caduceus-ph_seqlen-131k_d_model-256_n_layer-16 on the 1000 bp long DNA sequence at hg38 chr12:7792299-7793299. Specifically, mask each base one at a time, keeping all others unmasked, and compute the per position base 2 entropy of the predictions. Return the substring corresponding to the longest run with <0.5 entropy. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
